artPrompt: A hero shot of a worn wooden clipboard held upright at the center of the frame, its thick sheaf of blank smudged pages curling at the corners, a stub of pencil tucked under the clip, a bit of frayed twine looped around it; warm golden light glazes the board's scuffed surface against a soft hazy green-and-ivory blur of town green beyond, tender and slightly melancholic, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Petition Clipboard
text:
Equipped creature gets +0/+2 and has "Whenever this creature attacks, put a signature counter on it."
Equip {1}
flavorText: Page one is the petition. Pages two through forty are the same signature in increasingly confident handwriting.
